business_goal: Increase free trial signups by 20% over the next 30 days for our project management product.
target_market: Small business owners and team leads, 5-50 person companies
current_context: We just launched a Kanban board feature and have a $2,000 promotional budget for social ads.
constraints: Must stay consistent with existing brand voice: friendly, direct, no corporate jargon.

past_campaign_performance.notes: LinkedIn outperformed Instagram 3:1 for this audience
Highest ROI channel to date, underused so far
